calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Kurtiss A. Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Jack A. Austin.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 1, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Declaration of Plaintiff in Lieu of Personal Testimony-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of check from defendant to plaintiff
is the amount of $39.00 dated 02/01/06-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Account Summary - Undated------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---HSBC Bank Visa Platinum Statement for Plaintiff--------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A., and against defendant JACK A. AUSTIN as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,876.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $471.22.
Costs - $225.00, for a total of $3,572.99.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
